columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The text states, "289 patients (72.8%) in the combination arm versus 286 patients (72.8%) in the ADT alone arm had had no PLT and were considered to have de novo metastatic disease." Since de novo metastatic disease is equivalent to synchronous metastases, we can extract 289 (72.8%) for the treatment arm (ADT plus docetaxel).

columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Control
columns.extraction_plan: The text states, "289 patients (72.8%) in the combination arm versus 286 patients (72.8%) in the ADT alone arm had had no PLT and were considered to have de novo metastatic disease." Since de novo metastatic disease is equivalent to synchronous metastases, we can extract 286 (72.8%) for the control arm (ADT alone).

columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Metachronous | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: Not reported. The PDF does not explicitly report the number or percentage of patients with metachronous metastases in the treatment arm. We only have information about de novo (synchronous) metastases.

columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Metachronous | Control
